title: Special Programs: Bilingual Education/ESL
description: Conroe ISD's bilingual education and ESL (English as a Second Language) program policy outlines how the district identifies, supports, and serves students who are learning English. It sets the standards for the types of language programs offered, how students enter and exit those programs, and what resources are available to help English learners succeed academically. Parents of English learners can look to this policy to understand their rights and the supports their child is entitled to receive.
